44.reason: [Error: When encountering '+' or '-', the code stores the operator in m[t] and the number in n[j], but the index j is incremented after storing a[i], while the operator index t is incremented before storing b[i]. This causes a mismatch between operators and numbers in later calculations, as the number array n may have extra or misaligned entries. Additionally, the loop variable i is used to iterate over operators (b[i]), but the number array a is indexed by the same i, which may not correspond correctly because the number of operators and numbers differ by one.]
